commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: In Deuteronomy we read the curses and blessings of the Lord Deut. 27, which were afterwards uttered in Mount Gerizim and Ebal upon the righteous and upon the sinners. (St. Jerome)

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Fallen, by drops, (stillavit. Deuteronomy xxvii. 13. Haydock) like an inundation.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: In Deuteronomy we read the curses and blessings of the Lord (Deut. 27), which were afterwards uttered in Mount Gerizim and Ebal upon the righteous and upon the sinners.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Yea, all Israel have transgressed your law, even by departing, that they might not obey your voice; therefore the curse is poured upon us, and the oath that is written in the law of Moses the servant of God, because we have sinned against him. That is, Thou hast not poured out upon us all of Thy wrath, for we should not have been able to bear it, but Thou hast poured forth a mere droplet of Thy fury, in order that we might return unto Thee once we have been immeshed in Thy snare.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
